title: SCDP: Learning Humanoid Locomotion from Partial Observations via Mixed-Observation Distillation
abstract: Distilling humanoid locomotion control from offline datasets into deployable policies remains a challenge, as existing methods rely on privileged full-body states that require complex and often unreliable state estimation. We present Sensor-Conditioned Diffusion Policies (SCDP) that enables humanoid locomotion using only onboard sensors, eliminating the need for explicit state estimation. SCDP decouples sensing from supervision through mixed-observation training: diffusion model conditions on sensor histories while being supervised to predict privileged future state-action trajectories, enforcing the model to infer the motion dynamics under partial observability. We further develop restricted denoising, context distribution alignment, and context-aware attention masking to encourage implicit state estimation within the model and to prevent train-deploy mismatch. We validate SCDP on velocity-commanded locomotion and motion reference tracking tasks. In simulation, SCDP achieves near-perfect success on velocity control (99-100%) and 93% tracking success in AMASS test set, performing comparable to privileged baselines while using only onboard sensors. Finally, we deploy the trained policy on a real G1 humanoid at 50 Hz, demonstrating robust real robot locomotion without external sensing or state estimation.
summary:
# 论文总结：SCDP: Learning Humanoid Locomotion from Partial Observations via Mixed-Observation Distillation

## 1. 核心创新点

这篇论文的核心创新，不是再做一个更大的 humanoid diffusion policy，而是把训练监督和部署观测彻底解耦：推理时只输入 onboard proprioceptive sensors，训练时却监督未来 privileged state-action trajectories，让模型在部分可观测条件下内部学会隐式状态推断与动力学预测。它解决的是 humanoid locomotion 依赖 privileged full-body state 或外部 state estimation 才能落地的问题，本质上把显式状态估计改造成模型内部的隐式动力学推断。

## 2. 技术创新拆解

- **混合观测训练**：训练时只看传感器历史 O_t，但监督目标仍是未来 privileged trajectory；这种输入/监督不对称把 state estimation 从显式模块变成了策略内部推断，是 SCDP 能在无全局状态下工作的根本机制。
- **受限去噪**：在 denoising 输入里移除 pelvis linear velocity，但保留其作为监督目标，防止模型在训练中通过残余速度信号走捷径。它直接针对 velocity control 的 train-deploy mismatch，逼迫模型从历史上下文中恢复速度。
- **上下文分布对齐**：把训练上下文构造成与部署时一致的 clean/noised 关系，避免 prior work 中训练和推理阶段上下文分布不一致的问题。它主要提升稳定性和鲁棒性，而不是单纯抬高上限。
- **上下文感知注意力掩码**：允许 context window 内双向 attention，但对预测 horizon 保持 causal 约束，让模型能更充分聚合历史信息来恢复隐藏动力学。相比严格 causal mask，这更适合 partial observability 下的 latent state inference。

## 3. 方法论突破

- **新颖性**：以前的 teacher-student locomotion 多是 observation-to-action 的 reactive imitation，而 SCDP 蒸馏的是 trajectory-level generative planner。与 SOTA 的本质区别在于，privileged state 只用于训练监督，推理端完全只靠 onboard sensors，因此它解决的是 partial-observation diffusion distillation，而不是普通模仿学习。
- **关键技术**：核心是 trajectory-level DDPM：用 sensor history + command 作为条件，生成未来 state-action 序列，再叠加 restricted denoising、context distribution alignment 和 context-aware attention masking 三个机制，抑制速度捷径、缩小 train-deploy mismatch，并让模型在上下文中重建全局运动学。
- **理论支撑**：文中没有给出严格的理论证明、最优性分析或收敛性结论；主要是用 POMDP 动机和系统消融来支持“隐式状态推断会在这种训练范式下出现”这一判断。

## 4. 实验验证

- **主要基准/场景**：在 IsaacLab 仿真里评测 Perturbation Recovery、Joystick Control、Waypoint Navigation 三个 locomotion benchmark，以及 AMASS-walk / AMASS test set 的 motion reference tracking；最后在真实 Unitree G1 上以 50 Hz 闭环部署，验证了 仿真到真实。
- **性能提升**：无 velocity feedback 时，SCDP 在 Perturbation / Navigation / Joystick 上达到 99.8% / 99.8% / 100.0%，几乎贴近 privileged baseline OurSpriv 的 99.3% / 100.0% / 100.0%，并明显优于 BeyondMimicmo 无反馈版本的 92.0% / 5.6% / 93.0% 和 BCco 无反馈版本的 5.0% / 4.0% / 4.0%。在 AMASS tracking 上，success 从 Oursmo 的 79.17% 提升到 93.22%，MPJPE-G 从 473.91 降到 288.30；更重要的是 MPJPE-L 变化不大，说明主要收益来自 global consistency 和 drift reduction，而不是局部 pose 拟合。真机上模型可在 50 Hz 闭环运行，ONNX Runtime 推理吞吐约 105 Hz。
- **消融实验**：最大贡献来自 mixed-observation training：去掉它后导航成功率直接掉到 1.4%，而单独保留它仍有 74.2%，说明这是整套方法成立的前提；context distribution alignment 也很关键，移除后降到 9.7%。restricted denoising 和 full prefix attention 更像增益项，而 representation alignment 反而有害，移除后效果最好（97.8%）；此外，数据采集中的中等 action noise + push perturbation 也很重要，缺一时 recovery 会跌到 33% 以下。

## 5. 局限与启发

- **当前局限**：当前局限主要是：训练仍依赖 privileged simulation labels 和 expert rollouts，不能做到完全无监督；实验范围主要集中在 AMASS-walk 和 Unitree G1，跨机器人、跨地形的泛化文中未清楚披露；长时程 动作跟踪 仍有 global drift，且方向切换时存在约 250-500 ms 的滞后。即便如此，动作跟踪 success 93.22% 仍与 expert upper bound 99.03% 有约 5.8 pp 的差距。
- **未来方向**：作者明确提出的下一步是：不依赖 privileged state 的 仿真到真实 fine-tuning、面向长时程 tracking 的 drift correction，以及扩展到 contact-rich manipulation 和复杂地形。更广义地说，这条路线可演化成部分可观测机器人控制中的通用 trajectory diffusion 和隐式状态推断框架。
- **可迁移性**：这套思路对其他能在训练阶段获得 privileged supervision、但部署时只能拿到历史传感器的机器人任务有较强可迁移性，例如其他 biped / quadruped locomotion、reference tracking 或部分 manipulation；但如果任务无法构造稳定的 privileged 监督，或者历史观测本身不足以支撑隐式状态恢复，收益会明显下降。

## 6. 一句话总结

如果只能记住一件事，那就是：SCDP 证明了 humanoid diffusion controller 不必依赖部署时的 privileged state estimation，也能通过 mixed-observation distillation 把隐式状态推断直接学进 trajectory diffusion policy 里。

recognized_fields.title: SCDP: Learning Humanoid Locomotion from Partial Observations via Mixed-Observation Distillation
recognized_fields.abstract: Distilling humanoid locomotion control from offline datasets into deployable policies remains a challenge, as existing methods rely on privileged full-body states that require complex and often unreliable state estimation. We present Sensor-Conditioned Diffusion Policies (SCDP) that enables humanoid locomotion using only onboard sensors, eliminating the need for explicit state estimation. SCDP decouples sensing from supervision through mixed-observation training: diffusion model conditions on sensor histories while being supervised to predict privileged future state-action trajectories, enforcing the model to infer the motion dynamics under partial observability. We further develop restricted denoising, context distribution alignment, and context-aware attention masking to encourage implicit state estimation within the model and to prevent train-deploy mismatch. We validate SCDP on velocity-commanded locomotion and motion reference tracking tasks. In simulation, SCDP achieves near-perfect success on velocity control (99-100%) and 93% tracking success in AMASS test set, performing comparable to privileged baselines while using only onboard sensors. Finally, we deploy the trained policy on a real G1 humanoid at 50 Hz, demonstrating robust real robot locomotion without external sensing or state estimation.
